subagents.purpose: Complete delegated MCP work against the selected server capability using one or more MCP actions when needed.
subagents.when_to_use: Use this after choosing a specific MCP capability target for the user request.
subagents.target_requirements: Requires an MCP capability target selected by the main agent.
subagents.result_summary: Executes delegated MCP work on the selected server and returns a terminal completed, partial, or cannot_execute report.

subagents.purpose: Complete delegated local tool work inside the working directory using read_file for full UTF-8 reads, write_file for full-file writes, and edit_file for exact single-match text replacement.
subagents.when_to_use: Use this when the user request requires workspace file inspection, targeted edits, or full rewrites.
subagents.target_requirements: Requires a local tools scope selected by the main agent.
subagents.result_summary: Executes delegated local tool work and returns a terminal completed, partial, or cannot_execute report.
